texto: I can't explain something I saw on holiday on Holy Island when I was about nine years old, but do you know what, it could have been my PE teacher dressed in a monk's habit. I have no idea. I'm not a ghost person... it doesn't mean there aren't unexplained things; I just don't think they're ghosts.
explicacao: Citação de Tom Goodman-Hill sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I can't explain something I saw on holiday on Holy Island when I was about nine years old, but do…” articula reflexao, holiday, know em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como know e think.

frase_original: I can't explain something I saw on holiday on Holy Island when I was about nine years old, but do you know what, it could have been my PE teacher dressed in a monk's habit. I have no idea. I'm not a ghost person... it doesn't mean there aren't unexplained things; I just don't think they're ghosts.
